# Emergency Fund

```{r}
#| label: setup-r
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
source("_common.R")
```

```{python}
#| label: setup-py
#| include: false
```

<br>

An emergency fund is cash set aside to handle the unexpected without
reaching for credit. The standard target is **3 to 6 months of essential
expenses**, parked somewhere safe and liquid.

  - How much you actually need
  - Where to keep it (and where not to)
  - How to rebuild it after a withdrawal
